name: benchmark_core_exact
description: Bo testcase quy mo nho danh rieng cho cac thuat toan chinh xac (Vet can, Nhanh can, Don hinh, Gomory). Dung 3 moc N nho, ket hop sai so Gauss de ve duong cong ham mu ma khong bi Timeout.

name: benchmark_core_heuristic
description: Bo testcase quy mo lon danh cho Quy hoach dong va Tham lam. Ap dung y tuong cua Leader: 3 moc N lon (250, 500, 750) ket hop sai so cuc lon de tao thanh dai du lieu lien tuc (Gaussian Mixture).

name: benchmark_stress
description: Bo testcase stress test danh gia gioi han bo nho cua Quy hoach dong, co tinh day max_weight len 100,000 de xem bang DP phinh to co gay OOM (Out of Memory) khong.

name: extreme_n_test
description: Ep thuat toan Tham Lam chay het cong suat voi N khong lo, kiem tra xem do phuc tap O(N log N) duy tri duoc bao lau truoc khi qua tai.
